claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Braintrust is the AI observability platform helping teams measure, evaluate, and improve AI in production.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link labeled 'Pricing'.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible at https://www.braintrust.dev/docs without requiring a login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: The documentation includes a section on 'Integrations' which lists various AI providers, SDKs, and developer tools.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "Enterprise-grade access controls, authentication, and compliance agreements."
